articles.author: Ferdinand Knapp
articles.title: Netanyahu signals peace talks with Lebanon as Europe abhors continued Israeli bombing - politico.eu
articles.description: After initially ignoring Tuesday’s ceasefire, the Israeli prime minister announces direct talks to end the conflict will begin immediately.
articles.content: Netanyahu's announcement follows intense European pressure on Israel to halt its attacks on neighboring Lebanon. U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer told the ITN station Thursday that the attacks "shoul… [+1964 chars]
